We get
dog people
because we ARE dog people.
Dog parenting is wonderful, weird, and full of "is this my life?" moments. Sundays is here with you through all of it.

His digestion is amazing
since switching to Sundays

At Sundays, we take the science behind our food, the health
of our dogs, and our customer's happiness very seriously.
But that's about it.

She can eat and digest it
well and clearly likes the taste!
Flick Connection on YouTube talks Sundays benefits while Peanut faceplants into a bowl.

Sundays was started by two (super skilled) dog people, aka
people who know that dogs are family, that time with our dogs
is precious, and that being a dog parent can be WILD.

We use our social media to share fun, educational,
and interesting content that embraces everything it
means to be a dog parent today.
